    L

    ListAll() - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Lists all elements in the collection, displaying their string representation.
    ListEverythingCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for listing all elements in the collection.

    ListInfo() - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Displays information about the collection including type, initialization date, and element count.
    ListInfoCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for displaying collection information.
    ListInfoCommand() - Constructor for class com.commands.ListInfoCommand
     
    ListMetaData - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for listing collection metadata.
    ListMetaData() - Constructor for class com.commands.ListMetaData
     
    load(String) - Static method in class com.utils.CollectionFileManager
    Loads the music band collection from the specified file path.
    Load() - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Loads the collection from the default file path.
    Load(String) - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Loads the collection from a specified file path.
    LoadCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for loading the collection from a file.
    LoadCommand() - Constructor for class com.commands.LoadCommand
    Constructs a LoadCommand that uses the default file path.
    LoadCommand(String) - Constructor for class com.commands.LoadCommand
    Constructs a LoadCommand with a custom file path.
    loadFromFile() - Method in class com.utils.MinHeap
    Loads the collection from the default file path.
    loadFromFileSilently() - Method in class com.utils.MinHeap
     
    logClientConnected(String) - Static method in class com.server.LoggingMiddleware
    Logs client connection.
    logClientDisconnected(String) - Static method in class com.server.LoggingMiddleware
    Logs client disconnection.
    logCommand(String, String, long, boolean, String) - Static method in class com.server.LoggingMiddleware
    Logs a command execution without arguments.
    logCommand(String, String, Map, boolean, long, boolean, String) - Static method in class com.server.LoggingMiddleware
    Logs a command execution with data object.
    logCommand(String, String, Map, long, boolean, String) - Static method in class com.server.LoggingMiddleware
    Logs a command execution with all details.
    logError(String, String, Throwable) - Static method in class com.server.LoggingMiddleware
    Logs a server error.
    LoggingMiddleware - Class in com.server
    Logging middleware for server commands.
    LoggingMiddleware() - Constructor for class com.server.LoggingMiddleware
